2026-07-13.story: Upon waking up this morning, Jarra received a text from a secret admirer: 'Dearest lovely Jarra, meet me at Le mer del amor by the Seine at 8:00...'

suspects.name: Sean
suspects.bio: Works in accounting. Always leaves an extra coffee at her desk, but claims it's a mistake.

suspects.name: Richard
suspects.bio: Spoke to Jarra for an hour yesterday about 'work-life balance' and recommended romantic restaurants.

suspects.name: Childhood Friend
suspects.bio: Has known Jarra for 15 years. Recently started asking if she's seeing anyone.
